name: Signal Disruption
description: Locate and destroy 3 ARC signal towers in the crater zone.

name: First Contact
description: Retrieve data cores from downed ARC units near the eastern ridge.

name: The Nest
description: Eliminate the Matriarch queen guarding the underground nest.

name: Salvage Run
description: Recover pre-war equipment from the abandoned industrial complex.

name: Power Surge
description: Activate emergency generators across the grid sector to restore comms.

name: Contamination Protocol
description: Cleanse infected zones by deploying purge devices at contamination hotspots.

name: Supply Drop
description: Secure a fallen supply pod before ARC units reach it.

name: Probe Destruction
description: Destroy ARC probes scanning the northern territories.
objectives: Destroy 5 ARC probes in the north zone

name: Tick Infestation
description: Eliminate a swarm of Ticks that have overrun the old warehouse.

name: Wasp Queen
description: Locate and eliminate the Wasp Queen in the forest sector.
